Nimbus Labs

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA

TYPE

Full-time

COMPENSATION

$75,000 - $95,000 USD per

year

TECH STACK

Kotlin

Jetpack Compose

Android Studio

Coroutines

Room Database

Retrofit

JUnit4

Espresso

Gradle

Git

Junior Android Engineer

About Nimbus Labs: Nimbus Labs is a forward-thinking mobile
technology startup founded in 2019, specializing in cloud-
connected Android applications. We build innovative solutions
that help businesses engage their users through intelligent,
responsive mobile experiences. Our team is passionate about

leveraging modern Android development practices and cloud
integration to solve real-world problems.

We're seeking a Junior Android Engineer to join our mobile
development team. You'll work alongside experienced engineers
to build and maintain our flagship Android applications using

cutting-edge technologies like Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. This
role is perfect for someone early in their career who is eager to
learn modern Android development practices and contribute to
apps used by millions of users worldwide.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Develop new UI features and screens using Jetpack Compose
and Android XML layouts under guidance from senior
engineers

Implement data persistence using Room database and SQLite
for local storage optimization

Write and execute unit tests using JUnit4 and Espresso to

ensure code quality and feature stability

Collaborate with senior developers to refactor legacy code and
adopt modern Kotlin best practices

Participate in code reviews and daily stand-ups to
communicate progress and learn from team feedback

Debug and troubleshoot Android app issues using Android
Studio's debugger and profiling tools

Assist with Play Store deployment processes and coordinate
releases with the QA team

REQUIREMENTS

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering,
or related field, or equivalent practical experience

Proficiency in Kotlin programming with understanding of OOP
principles and functional programming concepts

Familiarity with Android fundamentals (Activities, Fragments,
Services, and the Android lifecycle)

Empowering mobile experiencesthrough intelligent cloud-nativesolutions Basic knowledge of REST APIs and JSON data parsing for
network communication

BONUS POINTS

Experience with Jetpack Compose or other modern UI
frameworks

Exposure to Android Coroutines for asynchronous
programming

Previous projects published on the Google Play Store or open-

source Android contributions

BENEFITS

Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance coverage

Professional development budget ($2,000 annually for courses
and conferences)

Flexible work arrangements with hybrid office/remote options

Generous paid time off (20 days) plus company holidays

Weekly team lunches and quarterly company outings

Access to latest development hardware and software tools

APPLY

Please submit your resume, a portfolio or GitHub link showcasing
your Android projects, and a cover letter explaining your interest
in mobile development to careers@nimbuslabs.io. Applicants will
be contacted within 1-2 weeks of submission. We review
applications on a rolling basis.
